steps.title: Use plurals after many
steps.content: The phrase its many calls for plain plural nouns naming Martian geological features. Since nothing after the nouns is being possessed, apostrophes would be incorrect.

steps.title: Reject possessive forms
steps.content: Choice A incorrectly makes rocks possessive. Choice C incorrectly makes craters possessive. Choice D makes both nouns possessive. The remaining choice uses simple plural forms for both features. The answer is B.
